score_detail: 1 secondary signal(s) active but below promotion threshold (1/1 promotable): Allied Response

advisories.message: Allied Response has been active for 25 consecutive runs based on routine diplomatic summit coverage mentioning Taiwan as a discussion topic, which is normal US-China agenda content rather than an allied reaction to a Taiwan-specific event. Consider whether this indicator is stuck on baseline diplomatic chatter.

evidence_quotes.key_phrase: summit between U.S. President Donald J. Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping, topics of discussion will include, Iran, Taiwan
evidence_quotes.why: US-China summit explicitly includes Taiwan as topic; tangential allied statement but direct Taiwan reference.

evidence_quotes.key_phrase: talks between their respective countries’ principal decision-makers, that will be dominated by trade, economic cooperation, and Taiwan
evidence_quotes.why: US-China principals' talks will address Taiwan; diplomatic engagement specifically referencing Taiwan.

7.description: Travel advisories upgraded, China restricts travel to Taiwan
7.summary: Checked US, UK, Japan, Australia travel advisories for Taiwan. All at normal levels (3 of 4 sources reachable).

10.name: Financial Stress
10.description: TWD/USD spike, TAIEX drop beyond normal volatility
